description: Jump to the definition of a C# symbol using Roslyn semantic analysis. Resolves the exact declaration site of a type, method, property, field or variable from any usage location — including symbols defined in other files, other asmdef assemblies, or Unity packages. Symbols defined in compiled assemblies (e.g. UnityEngine.dll) are reported as external metadata without a file path.

file_path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the .cs file containing the usage.

line.description: Optional 1-based line hint where the symbol appears (use the line numbers shown by read). Forgiving: if the symbol is not on this line, the nearest whole-word occurrence in the file is used and the output notes the adjustment. Omit it (or pass 0) when the symbol appears on only one line of the file; with several occurrences and no hint, the candidate lines are listed instead.
